name: Root
description:
Root is often among the earliest rifles you can find, either as a common drop or bought from a vending machine.

It typically spawns with a Dahl-style muzzle, improving handling through lower recoil, better accuracy and quicker recoil recovery. Compared with most other Torgue assault rifles, it generally trades per-shot damage for easier control.
notes: Obtained as a random world drop from any appropriate loot source.
